name: gate
description: Quality gates that actually block: GO/NO-GO checkpoints with explicit blocker lists before coding, merge, and deploy, plus a production-readiness review that scores 12 categories 0-10 (overall /100) and returns a launch status — BLOCKED / SAFE TO LAUNCH / LAUNCH WITH WARNINGS — where hard blockers force BLOCKED regardless of score. Skills: quality-gatekeeper, production-readiness-reviewer. Commands: /gate:before-code, /gate:before-merge, /gate:before-deploy, /gate:production-ready.
